new.description: This contains the Dockerfile for building and reproduing shellshock

new.name: CVE-2017-7921-Writeup-2026
new.description: Vulnerability research write-up on CVE-2017-7921 — a critical unauthenticated auth bypass in Hikvision IP cameras/DVRs/NVRs, covering root cause, exploitation path, detection, and remediation.

new.name: shellshock
new.description: Shelly is a lightweight and efficient vulnerability scanner designed to identify and mitigate Shellshock (CVE-2014-6271 & CVE-2014-7169) vulnerabilities in Bash environments.

new.name: SHELL-SCHOCK
new.description: CVE-2014-7169 Shell Shock

new.name: bash-shellshock
new.description: DEPRECATED: Chef cookbook to audit & remediate "Shellshock" (BASH-CVE-2014-7169)

new.name: puppet-shellshock
new.description: This module determine the vulnerability of a bash binary to the shellshock exploits (CVE-2014-6271 or CVE-2014-7169) and then patch that where possible

new.name: CVE-2026-52614
new.description: There is a SQL injection vulnerability in the backend of Ruoyi v4.8.3

new.name: metabase-cve-2023-38646
new.description: Repo contains the PoC and steps to reproduce cve 2023-38646

new.name: cve-2023-38646-poc
new.description: CVE-2023-38646是Metabase中的一个远程代码执行漏洞。该漏洞源于Metabase在处理未经身份验证的API端点/api/setup/validate时，对JDBC连接字符串的处理存在安全缺陷。攻击者可以通过构造特定的JDBC连接字符串，利用该端点在服务器上执行任意命令，而无需进行身份验证。

new.name: CVE-2026-46457
new.description: Reproducer for CVE-2026-46457 — Apache Camel camel-nats inbound header injection (Camel control-header injection via a NATS publisher; CamelHttpUri -> SSRF)

new.name: vsftpd-cve-2011-2523-lab
new.description: Pen Tesing Lab exploiting VSFTPD 2.3.4 backdoor via Metasploit Framework

new.name: CVE-2019-9702_Symantec_Encryption_Desktop_LPE_PoC
new.description: Local Privilege Escalation PoC to pop a SYSTEM shell for CVE-2019-9702 in Symantec Encryption Desktop.

new.name: CVE-2026-43499-Poc-Analysis
new.description: Vulnerability analysis and Proof of Concept (PoC) for CVE-2026-43499 affecting Xiaomi devices. For educational and research purposes only.

new.name: CVE-2026-15706
new.description: will be published

new.name: CVE-2026-46584
new.description: Reproducer for CVE-2026-46584: Apache Camel camel-mail mail.smtp.* header injection enabling credential theft via on-path SOCKS interception (fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0)

new.description: 本次个人漏洞研究进展成果

new.name: CVE-2026-23744-MCPJam-Exploit
new.description: A proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-23744 - MCPJam Inspector Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability. This tool demonstrates the security flaw in versions <=1.4.2 and helps security researchers verify patches. For authorized testing and educational purposes only. Includes multiple payload options, command execution, and session management.

new.description: Intentionally vulnerable VM-hosted Java shop — Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) workshop lab (EC2 / Azure VM / GCE)

new.description: GhostLock (CVE-2026-43499) kernel exploit for OnePlus devices with locked bootloader
